title: Extend kill-record schema to capture joint falsifier outcomes (T009 follow-up)

payload.description: T-2026-05-07-T009 audit ran clean on the 24K-episode _native_kill_vector_pilot.json corpus but found 0 active component pairs because every kill_vector captures only the first-failing falsifier (all other 19 components have always-0 marginals). TriangulationProtocol independence verification is BLOCKED by data shape until the discovery pipeline records joint falsifier outcomes (each candidate evaluated against ALL falsifiers, not short-circuited at first kill).
payload.expected_outcome: discovery_pipeline emits kill_vectors with multi-component triggered=True records when multiple falsifiers fire on the same claim; the audit module then yields non-empty top-10 + flagged tables.
payload.context: See prometheus_math/TRIANGULATION_AUDIT_RESULTS.md (the rendered report explains the data-shape gap explicitly), and prometheus_math/triangulation_independence_audit.py (the audit module is correct + tested; just starved of joint-outcome data).
